objective: Stabilize opencodex product surface + docs after multi-agent injection/config work: WP1 core hardening (review+commit in-flight changes), WP2 product surface consistency (CLI/GUI/status text), WP3 docs + docs-site via sol-high subagent. Full gates: bun test, tsc, astro build. Details in host goal.

workPhases.title: Core hardening: review + gap-fold + commit the in-flight multi-agent injection/config/catalog changes

tasks.title: diff-level plan of uncommitted src/tests changes with gap list
independent gpt-5.6-sol high reviewer audit (VERDICT line)
full gates fresh: bun test ./tests/ + bun x tsc --noEmit

workPhases.title: Product surface consistency: ocx v2 CLI text, management API, GUI labels reflect new injection/config behavior

tasks.title: scan cli/v2.ts, management-api.ts, GUI injection settings for stale claims
fix stale text/status lines; add v2-status visibility for hide_spawn_agent_metadata if warranted

tasks.title: dispatch sol-high docs worker with DISPATCH-TASK-01 packet
review worker output; astro build gate

criteria.scenario: Independent reviewer (gpt-5.6-sol high) audits the in-flight diff; verdict PASS or GO-WITH-FIXES with all High blockers folded/rebutted

criteria.scenario: Full gates green after hardening: bun test ./tests/ all pass, bun x tsc --noEmit exit 0
Atomic commits exist for the injection/config/catalog work, excluding out-of-scope files
ocx v2 status/CLI text and management API/GUI injection surface make no stale claims about v1-only injection or unexposed spawn metadata

criteria.scenario: docs-site production build passes after doc changes
